name: tailmux
description: Tailscale-aware tmux workspace launcher and status board.

scripts.smoke: node dist/cli.js scan --tailscale fixtures/tailscale-status.json --ssh-config fixtures/ssh_config --ports fixtures/ports.txt --format json >/tmp/tailmux-smoke.json && node dist/cli.js template examples/ai-lab.json --dry-run
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
